name: Baked Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound ground beef, browned and drained
2 Cans cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion and green pepper in butter until tender.
2. Add tomatoes, mushrooms, olives, and oregano to the skillet. Stir occasionally.
3. Add ground beef to the skillet and stir until the meat is evenly coated with the vegetables.
4. Simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Place half of the cooked spaghetti in a greased 13-in x 9-in baking dish.
6. Top the spaghetti with half of the vegetable mixture.
7. Sprinkle 1 cup of cheddar cheese over the top.
8. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
9. Mix soup and water until smooth, then pour evenly over the casserole.
10. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
11. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 30-35 minutes, or until bubbly and golden brown.
